name: Empire PowerShell Launch Parameters
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell command-line parameters commonly used by the Empire post-exploitation framework. These parameters are often used to hide the PowerShell console window, bypass security restrictions, and execute encoded commands.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious PowerShell command-line parameters associated with the Empire post-exploitation framework detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for signs of post-exploitation activity.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line, containing suspicious PowerShell parameters.
